activities_projects.title: Map Marking of India's Neighbours
activities_projects.objective: Identify countries sharing land boundaries with India
steps: Take an outline map of India
Refer to the atlas to identify neighbouring countries
Label Pakistan, Afghanistan, China, Nepal, Bhutan, Bangladesh and Myanmar
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students identify India's neighbouring countries on a map

activities_projects.title: States Through the Tropic of Cancer
steps: Locate the Tropic of Cancer on the map
Identify the states through which it passes
Write the names in order from west to east
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how the Tropic of Cancer divides India

activities_projects.title: India's Island Groups Study
activities_projects.objective: Learn about island groups of India
steps: Locate Lakshadweep Islands and Andaman & Nicobar Islands
Identify which sea they are located in
Write two features about each island group
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the location of India’s islands

activities_projects.title: Indian Standard Time Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the concept of Indian Standard Time
steps: Find 82°30′E longitude in the atlas
Locate Mirzapur through which it passes
Write why this longitude is used as the standard time for India
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the basis of Indian Standard Time

activities_projects.title: Time Difference Observation
steps: Locate Gujarat and Arunachal Pradesh on the map
Observe their longitudinal positions
Explain why sunrise occurs earlier in Arunachal Pradesh
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the relationship between longitude and time

activities_projects.title: India's Rank in the World
activities_projects.objective: Learn about India's size compared with other countries
steps: Look at the chart of largest countries
List the countries larger than India
Write India's rank in terms of area
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand India’s global size ranking

activities_projects.title: Trade Routes Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand India's role in global trade routes
steps: Observe the world map showing trade routes
Identify routes connecting Europe and East Asia
Explain how India's location helped trade
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand India's central position in trade routes

activities_projects.title: India's Land and Sea Boundaries
steps: Identify the northern mountain boundaries of India
Identify seas surrounding India
Write a short note describing these boundaries

activities_projects.title: Neighbouring Island Countries
steps: Locate Sri Lanka and Maldives on the map
Write their position relative to India
Mention the water bodies separating them

activities_projects.title: Historical Trade Influence Activity
steps: Read about ancient trade routes from India
List two ideas or goods that spread from India
Explain their influence on other regions
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand cultural and trade exchanges
